title: Fix composer footer and sidebar settings contrast
description: User reported low-contrast highlighting on composer footer controls and sidebar Settings button in dark theme. Increase baseline label contrast and hover/focus surface visibility for these controls.
notes:
Follow-up: previous contrast pass over-corrected sidebar Settings hover, affected settings Back button instead, and did not materially improve composer footer control readability.
Add dark-theme OpenAI symbol treatment for the composer model picker so the logo remains visible against hover backgrounds.
